title: Analysis of Satellite Image and Videos Suggest Precision U.S. Strikes on Iranian Water Facility
summary_full: It is unclear if the U.S. intentionally struck the facility or knew what it was. Deliberately targeting civilian infrastructure could constitute a war crime.
summary_public: It is unclear if the U.S. intentionally struck the facility or knew what it was. Deliberately targeting civilian infrastructure could constitute a war crime.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Deliberately targeting civilian infrastructure could constitute a war crime.
